payload.goal: Implement the three workflow improvements by updating orchestrator prompts
payload.why: Current system has unclear handover flow, hidden JSON for users, and orchestrator ignores AGENT.md prerequisites
changes: Add Handoff Writer section: writes JSON to .opencode/sessions/<session_id>/handoffs/<seq>.json
Add Self-Service Delegation: pass only file path to subagent
Add Summary Generator: 2-3 sentence summary for user display
Add Status Update Hook: phase transitions (routing, planning, execution, review, recording)
Add AGENT.md Parser: find '## Prerequisites' section, execute bash code blocks
Add Prerequisite Enforcement: execute prerequisites BEFORE delegating
done_when: Both orchestrator prompts updated with all sections
edge_cases_or_failure_paths: AGENT.md missing: fallback to no prerequisites
Worktree already exists: skip or warn
examples:
AGENT.md Prerequisites: '## Prerequisites
```bash
git worktree add -b feature/123 ../feature-123
```'
known_risks_or_limitations: Status updates depend on prompt compliance
